subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Your letter was received. The meanings of love and affection were manifest, as were knowledge and wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین نامه شما وصول یافت معانی مهر و محبت آشکار بود و دانش و معرفت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @predictions and prophecies
